gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/62)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/62)
text: مَا قَتَلَنَا مَنْ أَذَاعَ حَدِيثَنَا قَتْلَ خَطَإٍ وَ لَكِنْ قَتَلَنَا قَتْلَ عَمْدٍ .

en.hubeali: Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from one of his companions,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who publicised our<sup>asws</sup> Ahadeeth did not kill us an erroneous killing, but he killed us<sup>asws</sup> a deliberate killing’.
en.sarwar: 4. Yunus ibn Ya’qub has narrated from certain individuals of his people from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Whoever publicizes our (confidential) Hadith is like one who does not kill us by mistake but he does so on purpose.’”
